lineage.Process: Near 建筑底图 消防站 # NO_LOCATION NO_ANGLE 平面 "NEAR_FID NEAR_FID;NEAR_DIST NEAR_DIST"
Near 建筑底图 消防栓 # NO_LOCATION NO_ANGLE 平面 "NEAR_FID NEAR_FID1;NEAR_DIST NEAR_DIST1"

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.0.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=D:\超图杯\二维底图shp0517第二版</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>建筑底图.shp</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>字段</field_name><field_type>LONG</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>score_use</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>score_fs</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>score_hy</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>total_risk</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField 建筑底图 total_risk "!Score_Use! * 0.5 + !Score_FS! * 0.3 + !Score_HY! * 0.2" "Python 3" # 文本 NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

ExportFeatures 建筑底图 D:\超图杯\成果\高危图.shp # NOT_USE_ALIAS "SmUserID "SmUserID" true true false 9 Long 0 9,First,#,建筑底图,SmUserID,-1,-1;Shape_Leng "Shape_Leng" true true false 24 Double 15 23,First,#,建筑底图,Shape_Leng,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" true true false 24 Double 15 23,First,#,建筑底图,Shape_Area,-1,-1;类型 "类型" true true false 10 Text 0 0,First,#,建筑底图,类型,0,10;字段 "字段" true true false 10 Long 0 10,First,#,建筑底图,字段,-1,-1;NEAR_FID "NEAR_FID" true true false 10 Long 0 10,First,#,建筑底图,NEAR_FID,-1,-1;NEAR_DIST "NEAR_DIST" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,建筑底图,NEAR_DIST,-1,-1;NEAR_FID1 "NEAR_FID1" true true false 10 Long 0 10,First,#,建筑底图,NEAR_FID1,-1,-1;NEAR_DIST1 "NEAR_DIST1" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,建筑底图,NEAR_DIST1,-1,-1;score_use "score_use" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,建筑底图,score_use,-1,-1;score_fs "score_fs" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,建筑底图,score_fs,-1,-1;score_hy "score_hy" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,建筑底图,score_hy,-1,-1;total_risk "total_risk" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,建筑底图,total_risk,-1,-1" #

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
